name: Can I designate my own docs AEO?
description: **Yes, but risk sanctions if overused.** Justify strictly.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I designate my own docs AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Yes, but risk sanctions if overused.** Justify strictly.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, but sparingly and justifiably to avoid sanctions.** Must meet high confidentiality threshold.[1] Key factors: Trade secrets primarily. Document risk assessment. Opponent challenge likely. Use tiered orders. Consult e-discovery specialist.
